prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Detemir 20units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.8 kg; Height 174.9 cm; BMI 18.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.5%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 255mg/dL; 9 months ago 271mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 320mg/dL; current 288mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 61.8kg; 9 months ago 56.6kg; 6 months ago 59.3kg; 3 months ago 56.2kg; current 57.8kg), Height (12 months ago 174.9cm; 9 months ago 174.9cm; 6 months ago 174.9cm; 3 months ago 174.9cm; current 174.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 18.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 62mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 25U/L), AST (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; current 26mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 156mg/g; 9 months ago 209mg/g; 6 months ago 174mg/g; 3 months ago 240mg/g; current 236mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 115mg/dL; 9 months ago 117mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 106mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.94 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
